name: Report Card Print
css: @page { size: A4; margin: 10mm; } body { font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; color: #333; } .report-card { max-width: 190mm; margin: 0 auto; border: 2px solid #2c3e50; padding: 5mm; } .header { text-align: center; border-bottom: 2px solid #2c3e50; padding-bottom: 3mm; margin-bottom: 3mm; } .school-name { font-size: 20pt; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; } .school-address { font-size: 9pt; color: #666; } .report-title { font-size: 16pt; font-weight: bold; color: #c0392b; margin-top: 2mm; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; } .student-header { display: flex; gap: 5mm; margin-bottom: 3mm; padding: 3mm; background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 5px; } .student-details { flex: 1; font-size: 10pt; } .detail-row { display: flex; padding: 1.5mm 0; border-bottom: 1px dotted #ddd; } .detail-label { width: 35mm; font-weight: bold; color: #555; } .detail-value { flex: 1; } .grade-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 3mm 0; } .grade-table th { background: #2c3e50; color: #fff; padding: 2.5mm 3mm; text-align: left; font-size: 10pt; } .grade-table td { padding: 2.5mm 3mm; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 10pt; } .grade-table tr:nth-child(even) { background: #f8f9fa; } .grade-table .total-row { background: #e8f4f8; font-weight: bold; } .performance-section { margin: 3mm 0; padding: 3mm; background: #f0f8f0; border: 1px solid #d4edda; border-radius: 5px; } .performance-section h4 { margin: 0 0 2mm 0; color: #155724; } .remarks-section { margin: 3mm 0; padding: 3mm; background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; border-radius: 5px; } .remarks-section h4 { margin: 0 0 2mm 0; color: #856404; } .remarks-text { font-size: 10pt; color: #856404; font-style: italic; } .attendance-box { display: flex; gap: 5mm; margin: 3mm 0; padding: 3mm; background: #e8f4f8; border-radius: 5px; } .attendance-item { text-align: center; flex: 1; } .attendance-item .number { font-size: 18pt; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; } .attendance-item .label { font-size: 8pt; color: #666; } .signatures { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 5mm; padding-top: 3mm; border-top: 2px solid #ddd; } .signature { text-align: center; width: 30%; } .signature .line { border-top: 1px solid #333; margin-top: 8mm; padding-top: 2mm; font-size: 9pt; color: #555; }
html:
{{ frappe.db.get_single_value('Education Settings', 'school_name') or 'BIZAXL SCHOOL' }}
{{ frappe.db.get_single_value('Education Settings', 'school_address') or '' }}
ACADEMIC REPORT CARD
Student Name{{ doc.student_name }}
Class{{ doc.student_group or '' }}
Academic Year{{ doc.academic_year or '' }}
Exam Term{{ doc.exam_term or '' }}
Roll No.{{ doc.roll_no or '' }}
{% if doc.subjects %}{% set total_max = 0 %}{% set total_obtained = 0 %}{% for sub in doc.subjects %}{% set total_max = total_max + (sub.max_marks or 0) %}{% set total_obtained = total_obtained + (sub.marks_obtained or 0) %}{% endfor %}
SubjectMax MarksMarks ObtainedGradeRemarks
{{ sub.subject or '' }}{{ sub.max_marks or '' }}{{ sub.marks_obtained or '' }}{{ sub.grade or '' }}{{ sub.remarks or '' }}
Total{{ total_max }}{{ total_obtained }}
{% else %}

No subject data available

{% endif %}
{{ doc.total_working_days or 'N/A' }}
Working Days

Teacher's Remarks
